job_description:
# Healthcare Data Analyst with Population Health
Company: People Force Consulting Inc
Source: Dice
Employment type: Contract W2 / Contract Corp To Corp
Checked: April 30, 2026
Posted: April 29, 2026
URL: https://www.dice.com/job-detail/eeda7e98-531e-4e24-bec2-915f1b1b9025

## Highlights
- Remote healthcare/population health analytics role posted 21 hours ago on Dice.
- Focuses on advanced SQL, large-scale data analysis, dashboards, BI reporting, data validation, and healthcare/population health insights.
- Requires BI/dashboarding tools such as AWS QuickSight, Tableau, or Power BI and customer-facing analytics communication.
- Good-to-have areas include payer analytics, value-based care, utilization, cost of care, quality, and risk use cases.
strengths: Strong fit for healthcare SQL analysis, data validation, BI dashboards, and stakeholder-ready insights.
Population health, payer analytics, utilization, cost, quality, and risk themes align with healthcare data experience.
Remote role and data quality language map directly to the candidate profile.
gaps: AWS QuickSight/Redshift/Athena are not core resume strengths; keep them as adjacent or learning areas.
Contract role and customer-facing BI expectations should be verified.
notes: Apply first if contract work is acceptable. Tailor toward healthcare SQL, population health analytics, BI validation, Power BI/Tableau, and data quality across large datasets.
